metaDescription: Experienced Web Developer specializing in creating responsive, user-friendly websites and applications. Explore my portfolio to see projects showcasing my expertise in modern web technologies. Let's collaborate to bring your digital ideas to life.
author: mrozyyev
heroDescription: Creative and technically proficient Web Developer and UI/UX Designer with over ~2 years of experience, currently studying + living in Romania. Right now my main focus is on Web development.
aboutDescription: Hello 👋 I am a creative and technically proficient Web Developer and UI/UX Designer with over ~2 years of experience, currently studying + living in Romania. I'm passionate about building new products and learning new technologies.
aboutBio:
My career began in graphic design, transitioned through UI/UX design, and evolved into web development—where I rediscovered my true passion for coding. I find web development the most enjoyable and fulfilling aspect of my work, and I thrive on the challenge, creativity, unlimited learning opportunity it offers.

Now that I am based in Europe, I am eager to join a dynamic team where I can further develop my skills and contribute to innovative projects.
